product: Serverless GPU compute now supports multinode workloads
tagline: Serverless GPU compute now supports multinode workloads.
what_it_does: Serverless GPU compute now supports multinode workloads. Public Preview AI Runtime for single node tasks is in Public Preview. The distributed training API for multi GPU workloads remain in Beta.
why_it_matters: You can use AI Runtime to train and fine tune custom models using your favorite frameworks and get state of the art efficiency, performance, and quality.
key_takeaway: Serverless GPU compute now supports multinode workloads.
